chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1029 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections 2.For hearing of CMA 4319/23 3.For hearing of main case 21-03-2024 Mr. Rahmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate holds brief on behalf of Mr. Rakesh Kumar Dhalore, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ishfaque Ahmed Abro, Assistant Attorney General a/w DSP Muhammad Imran and SI Sarfraz Khan of National Highway & Motorway Police, Sukkur. ***** Since filing of this petition, counsel for petitioner was put on notice to satisfy the Court about maintainability of this petition filed for up-gradation of his post from BPS-01 to BPS-05 without bringing any material to support his case or any representation filed by him before his superiors for such purpose. Learned counsel for petitioner instead of satisfying the Court has mostly chosen to remain absent. Today, also he is not present and on his behalf of Mr. Rahmat Ali Shaikh, Advocate holding brief has refused to proceed with the matter. On the other hand, learned AAG and officials in attendance submit that there is already a policy in the National Highway & Motorway Police Department for up-gradation and if the case of the petitioner falls within that policy, he would be given a relief accordingly. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
